sections.paragraph: χιλίαρχος, ου, ὁ [χίλιοι, ἄρχω] rendering of the Lat. tribunus militum ‘military tribune’ = commander of a cohort, or subdivision of a legion, consisting in theory of a tenth of a legion or 600 soldiers, but with numbers varying dependent on the period, high ranking military officer Mk 6:21; J 18:12; Ac 21:31-33, 37; 23:17-19; 25:23; Rv 6:15; 19:18.
